theorems.statement_text: (p: α → Bool) (xs: List α) (ys: List α) : (filter p (xs ++ ys) = (filter p xs) ++ (filter p ys))
theorems.local_ctx:
def filter (p: α → Bool) (xs: List α) : List α :=
  match xs with
  | [] => []
  | x :: xs =>
    if p x then
      x :: filter p xs
    else
      filter p xs

theorems.statement_text: (x: Nat) (xs: List Nat) : x ∈ ins1 x xs
theorems.local_ctx:
def ins1 : Nat → List Nat → List Nat
  | n, [] => [n]
  | n, x::xs => if n == x then x::xs else x::(ins1 n xs)

theorems.statement_text: (x: Nat) (xs: List Nat) : x ∈ ins x xs
theorems.local_ctx:
def ins: Nat → List Nat → List Nat
  | n, []  =>  [n]
  | n, x::xs => if (n < x) then n :: x :: xs else x :: (ins n xs)

def dropWhile : (α → Bool) → List α → List α
  | _, [] => []
  | p, x::xs => if p x then dropWhile p xs else x::xs

def takeWhile : (α → Bool) → List α → List α
  | _, [] => []
  | p, x::xs => if p x then x ::(takeWhile p xs) else []

theorems.statement_text: (x: Nat) (xs: List Nat) : not (x ∈ delete x xs)
theorems.local_ctx:
def delete : Nat → List Nat → List Nat
  | _, [] => []
  | n, x::xs => if n == x then (delete n xs) else x::(delete n xs)

inductive MyTree (α: Type) where
| leaf : MyTree α
| node : MyTree α → α → MyTree α  →  MyTree α

def height' : MyTree α → ℕ
  | .leaf => 0
  | .node l _x r => (max (height' l) (height' r)).succ

def mirror : MyTree α → MyTree α
  | MyTree.leaf => MyTree.leaf
  | MyTree.node l x r => MyTree.node r x l

theorems.statement_text: (n: Nat) (xs: List α) (ys: List β) : (drop n (zip' xs ys) = zip' (drop n xs) (drop n ys))
theorems.local_ctx:
def drop (n: Nat) (xs: List α) : List α :=
  match n, xs with
  | 0, _ => xs
  | _, [] => []
  | n + 1, _ :: xs => drop n xs

def zip' : List α → List β → List (α × β)
  | [], _ => []
  | _, [] => []
  | x::xs, y::ys => ⟨x, y⟩ :: zip' xs ys

theorems.statement_text: (x: Nat) (xs: List Nat) : (sorted xs → sorted (insort x xs))
theorems.local_ctx:
def insort : Nat → List Nat → List Nat
  | n, [] => [n]
  | n, x::xs => if n <= x then n::x::xs else x::(insort n xs)

def sorted : List Nat → Bool
  | [] => True
  | [_x] => True
  | x::y::xs => and (x <= y) (sorted (y::xs))

def insort : Nat → List Nat → List Nat
  | n, [] => [n]
  | n, x::xs => if n <= x then n::x::xs else x::(insort n xs)

def sort : List Nat → List Nat
  | [] => []
  | x::xs => insort x (sort xs)

def sorted : List Nat → Bool
  | [] => True
  | [_x] => True
  | x::y::xs => and (x <= y) (sorted (y::xs))

theorems.statement_text: (xs: List α) (ys: List β) : (length xs = length ys) → (zip' (reverse xs) (reverse ys) = reverse (zip' xs ys))
theorems.local_ctx:
def length (xs: List α) : Nat :=
  match xs with
  | [] => 0
  | _ :: xs => 1 + length xs

def reverse (xs: List α) : List α :=
  match xs with
  | [] => []
  | x :: xs => reverse xs ++ [x]

def zip' : List α → List β → List (α × β)
  | [], _ => []
  | _, [] => []
  | x::xs, y::ys => ⟨x, y⟩ :: zip' xs ys

theorems.statement_text: (n: Nat) (xs: List Nat) : (count n xs = count n (sort xs))
theorems.local_ctx:
def count (x: Nat) (ys: List Nat): Nat :=
  match ys with
  | [] => 0
  | y :: ys =>
    if x = y then
      count x ys + 1
    else
      count x ys

def insort : Nat → List Nat → List Nat
  | n, [] => [n]
  | n, x::xs => if n <= x then n::x::xs else x::(insort n xs)

def sort : List Nat → List Nat
  | [] => []
  | x::xs => insort x (sort xs)

theorems.statement_text: (n: Nat) (xs: List α) (ys: List α) : (drop n (xs ++ ys) = drop n xs ++ drop (n - length xs) ys)
theorems.local_ctx:
def drop (n: Nat) (xs: List α) : List α :=
  match n, xs with
  | 0, _ => xs
  | _, [] => []
  | n + 1, _ :: xs => drop n xs

def length (xs: List α) : Nat :=
  match xs with
  | [] => 0
  | _ :: xs => 1 + length xs

theorems.statement_text: (n: Nat) (m: Nat) (xs: List α) : (drop n (drop m xs) = drop (n + m) xs)
theorems.local_ctx:
def drop (n: Nat) (xs: List α) : List α :=
  match n, xs with
  | 0, _ => xs
  | _, [] => []
  | n + 1, _ :: xs => drop n xs

theorems.statement_text: (n: Nat) (m: Nat) (xs: List α) : (drop n (take m xs) = take (m - n) (drop n xs))
theorems.local_ctx:
def take (n: Nat) (xs: List α) : List α :=
  match n, xs with
  | 0, _ => []
  | _, [] => []
  | n + 1, x :: xs => x :: take n xs

def drop (n: Nat) (xs: List α) : List α :=
  match n, xs with
  | 0, _ => xs
  | _, [] => []
  | n + 1, _ :: xs => drop n xs
